event: UFC Fight Night: Muhammad vs. Bonfim

items.fight_news: Number five ranked Belal Muhammad looks to defend his position in the welterweight elite against the surging number eleven ranked Gabriel Bonfim in the main event.
The analytical read here is whether Muhammad's legendary pace and pressure can break the explosive finishing instincts of the highly touted Brazilian prospect.
Brendan Allen and Edmen Shahbazyan square off in a high stakes middleweight clash that promises immediate action from the opening bell.
This is a classic grappler versus striker dynamic. Shahbazyan aims for an early knockout, while Allen will undoubtedly try to drag this fight into his world on the mat.
France's Farès Ziam looks to continue his climb up the lightweight ranks against the dangerous Australian prospect Tom Nolan.
Stylistically, this fight will be determined by range. Ziam wants a technical kickboxing match at a distance, while Nolan prefers to close the gap and enforce his will.
Fan favorite Bryce Mitchell remains on the card to face late replacement Santiago Luna after Victor Henry was forced to withdraw.
Luna steps up on short notice for the opportunity of a lifetime. He must find a way to keep the fight standing against one of the division's most relentless grapplers.
Poland's Iwo Baraniewski faces a sudden change of plans as he now takes on the heavy handed Junior Tafa in a light heavyweight collision.
Tafa brings massive striking power to the Octagon, forcing Baraniewski to quickly adjust his game plan for a completely different kind of threat.
Veteran Matt Schnell welcomes Alessandro Costa in a 130-pound catchweight bout after Imanol Rodríguez withdrew just nine days before the event.
Costa gets a massive short notice opportunity to prove himself against a ranked mainstay, making this a highly volatile and unpredictable preliminary matchup.
Marcus McGhee looks to keep his momentum going against John Yannis, who steps in to replace an injured Jakub Wikłacz.
With a major shift in opponents, McGhee's adaptability will be severely tested by a newcomer eager to make a name for himself under the bright lights.

bouts.title: Bruno Gustavo da Silva vs. Édgar Cháirez

items.fight_news: Flyweight action kicks into high gear as the explosive Brazilian Bruno Silva takes on Mexico's highly motivated Édgar Cháirez.
Both men are known for their finishing abilities, practically guaranteeing a high paced, fan friendly battle from the very first minute.
Priscila Cachoeira brings her signature aggressive brawling style to the Octagon against the well rounded Chelsea Chandler.
The narrative focus is firmly on whether Chandler's technique can weather the inevitable early storm that Cachoeira always brings to her fights.
Originally scheduled for a couple of weeks prior, this highly anticipated featherweight bout finally takes place at the Meta APEX.
Leavitt's slick submission game meets Brito's terrifying knockout power in a clash of wildly opposing styles that has fans incredibly excited.
Brazil's Jeisla Chaves looks to justify her status as a massive betting favorite against Venezuela's Yuneisy Duben.
Duben enters the cage with a huge chip on her shoulder, eager to derail the hype train and secure a massive upset victory.
Two Brazilian strawweights look to make a statement as the technical Ketlen Souza takes on the powerhouse Ariane Carnelossi.
It is a battle of finesse versus brute strength, serving as a crucial stepping stone for whoever emerges victorious.
